text: I'm really disappointed with my recent order. The product was supposed to be a high-quality kitchen appliance, but when it arrived, it was missing several parts, including a critical component. I had to run out to buy replacements myself, which is just unacceptable! Don't you guys check your inventory or something? Also, I don't understand why the shipping took so long when I paid for express delivery. This experience has been far from satisfactory and I feel like I deserve some sort of compensation for all the hassle.
I can't believe my account got locked! I need access ASAP, this is so frustrating!
I thought I signed up for premium, but my account says basic? Really confused here.
I would like to inquire about the status of my recent order. However, I believe I did not place any orders. Can you confirm whether there are any pending orders under my account?
My app keeps crashing when I try to upload pics. What’s up with that? Got a strong connection but still nothing.
I sent my order weeks ago, but got an email saying it was canceled. Why am I just finding out now? This is frustrating!
hey, so I got this shirt but it’s like way too small, can I get my money back? also, what’s with the delivery? took forever...
I ordered a blue shirt, but I got a red hat? What even is that? My mom's gonna be so mad she wanted the shirt. Totally messed up.
hey, I keep getting the error message but I already paid for this, wth?
I really need my money back! This thing is totally a scam, it doesn't work at all and I'm super frustrated.
I am currently unable to access my account, and despite numerous attempts to reset my password, the email prompts do not seem to be reaching me. Could you assist me with this matter?
hey, I was charged for a year but I wanted the month. can u refund me?
My app just won't open anymore! It keeps crashing. I've tried restarting my phone but nothing works. Help!

I've been trying to upload this file for the past hour, and it just keeps saying something's wrong. Not sure if it's the file type or size, but it would be great to get some guidance on what to do here. I've got a deadline coming up, and I hope I won't lose any data in the process! Please help!
I’m really upset. Got the wrong order again. Like, how hard is it to get my details right? It’s not what I asked for. Frustrating 😡.

I must express my dissatisfaction with your service, as I have experienced several issues that I had thought would be resolved by now. Additionally, I find it quite perplexing that my previous emails regarding these matters went unanswered, which is uncharacteristic of a company of your stature.
